issues.title: Automate transcript-to-issue extraction workflow
issues.description: Build the first version of a workflow that turns meeting transcripts from the note taker into proposed GitHub Issues. The workflow should read transcript files, create reviewable agent output files, and wait for human approval before any GitHub Issues are created.

issues.title: Investigate Otter or note taker API access for transcript ingestion
issues.description: Research whether Rajat's note taker or Otter provides an accessible API, webhook, or endpoint that can trigger transcript processing after each meeting. Include any pricing, permissions, or integration limits discovered.

issues.title: Define GitHub project board workflow for meeting-generated issues
issues.description: Continue setting up the GitHub project board workflow so issues can be assigned, moved between statuses, broken into subtasks, and used similarly to a Jira board for project coordination.

issues.title: Research desalination and deep nuclear source assets for project board
issues.description: Find existing GitHub repositories, models, photographs, or other source assets related to desalination and deep nuclear concepts. Add findings as candidates for the Arts Engine and Abundance Engine project board.

issues.title: Prototype Arts Engine and Abundance Engine integration with Tripo
issues.description: Experiment with connecting Arts Engine and Abundance Engine by pulling rows of props from a CSV or similar file, sending image or prop inputs to Tripo, and managing each generated asset as a storyboard/component item.

issues.title: Bring GPU Colab process into local backup workflow
issues.description: Convert or bring down the working GPU Colab process into the backup workflow using either the pure Python backup file or the interactive notebook version. Investigate local non-GPU issues and document fixes that can be posted back to the Colab/Gemini workflow.

issues.title: Add San Diego and Savannah desalination scenarios
issues.description: Add the San Diego desal plant and Savannah desal plant scenarios mentioned in Discord to the relevant energy and water scenario work.

issues.title: Research Azure backend option for API key handling
issues.description: Investigate whether the current web root or pipeline folder can be pulled into Azure hosting or another backend-backed deployment so API key handling can move beyond browser-local storage where appropriate.
